history.title: Creating Clickable DIVs
history.description: "Creating Clickable DIVs By Chris Coyier On July 16, 2007j Query DIV's are a must in all CSS-based web design. They give you all kinds of fantastic positioning ability and give structure to your HTML. You can put links inside of a DIV, of course, but sometimes you just want the whole DIV to be click
